LinkedLuv is an innovative Chrome plugin that enhances your LinkedIn experience by integrating dating features within a professional environment. Display your marital status and manage your personal connections seamlessly while maintaining your professional image. With LinkedLuv, you can confidently explore meaningful relationships alongside your career aspirations. Join us in bridging the gap between professional networking and personal connections.
Browser extension with custom new tab page

Armrest transforms your new tab page into a beautiful, all-in-one dashboard. Designed with a clean bento-grid aesthetic and a soothing purple accent, it keeps everything you need at your fingertips.

Features
📁 Bookmark Manager
Organize bookmarks into colorful folders with drag-and-drop sorting. Add new bookmarks with auto-fetched website metadata and icons. Export/import your bookmarks as JSON for backup.

🔍 Smart Search Bar
Type anything — URLs navigate directly, bookmark names open instantly, and prefixes route to the right destination: g: for Google, dict: for dictionary, ai: for AI search via Perplexity.

🌤️ Live Weather
Auto-detects your location to show current conditions with elegant icons. Supports 40+ weather types from sunny to stormy.

📰 Multi-source News
Browse AI news, IT news, and Hacker News — all from your new tab page. Switch between categories with one click.

📖 Word Lookup
Look up English words on the fly. Each word becomes a colorful card; click any card to see its full definition and pronunciation.

⏰ Clock & Calendar
A Braun-style dot-matrix clock keeps perfect time, alongside a calendar that shows both Gregorian and Chinese lunar dates.

💡 Daily Quote
Each day brings a fresh dose of inspiration, with one tap to refresh.

📌 Read Later
Save pages to read later directly from the popup. Your reading list lives on your new tab page, ready when you are.

🌓 Theme Support
Dark, light, or system-follow — switch anytime with an animated toggle.

⚡ Popup Quick Actions
Click the extension icon to browse folders, open bookmarks, or save the current page — all without leaving your current tab.
